scenarios.title: prints page as PDF and verifies the buffer is a valid PDF file @positive @e2e
scenarios.userAction: Navigate to the Boni Garcia Selenium demo page and generate a PDF using the browser's CDP print-to-PDF API, then assert the returned buffer begins with the PDF magic bytes.
expectedAssertions: page.pdf() returns a Buffer whose first 4 bytes equal '%PDF' in ASCII (equivalently, the base64 encoding starts with 'JVBER'), confirming a valid PDF was produced

locatorTable.notes: Requires baseURL: 'https://bonigarcia.dev' in playwright.config.ts. If project already has a different baseURL, fall back to a named constant BONIGARCIA_DEMO_URL with an absolute goto() call — see pin 1 and Q1 in the markdown plan.
page.pdf() is the direct Playwright CDP equivalent of PrintsPage.print(). Returns Buffer directly — no base64 cast needed. Requires headless Chromium (see Q4 in the markdown plan).

hallucinationDefensePins.elementDescription: Navigation target URL for the Boni Garcia Selenium demo page
hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q1 unresolved: external demo SUT — if project baseURL already points at a different host, this relative path navigates to the wrong domain. Use absolute URL constant instead.
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: If playwright.config.ts already sets a different baseURL, replace with: const BONIGARCIA_DEMO_URL = 'https://bonigarcia.dev/selenium-webdriver-java/'; await page.goto(BONIGARCIA_DEMO_URL); — alternatively, isolate this test in a separate Playwright project with its own baseURL.
